data.content: Shipment review complete. Verified merge commit c1bf08f6 is on origin/main (final main HEAD c8bae23c includes both this knot and sibling foolery-988b). All four quality gates pass on final origin/main: lint clean, tsc clean, test 311 files / 3109 passed, build clean. Acceptance #1-#4 met: single canonical 'agentname' key on line 121, no fallback chains, omits missing fields. Ready to ship.
